moments.title: England in World Cup Quarter-Finals
moments.blurb: England has advanced to the FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Finals after a 3-2 victory over Mexico today, and will face Norway on Saturday, July 11.

angles.name: England's journey continues
angles.copy: They've done it! England are through to the World Cup Quarter-Finals. Who's backing the Three Lions to go all the way?

angles.name: Next up: Norway
angles.copy: Saturday, July 11th. England vs Norway in the Quarter-Finals. Get your plans sorted early! What are your predictions for the score?

moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships 2026 are in their second week, leading up to the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals on the final weekend, July 11-12.

angles.name: Centre Court drama
angles.copy: It's Finals Week at Wimbledon! Who are you rooting for to lift the trophy on Centre Court this weekend? 🎾

angles.name: Strawberries and Cream ready
angles.copy: The grass courts are buzzing for the final stages of Wimbledon 2026. Get your strawberries and cream ready for some epic tennis!

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues
moments.blurb: A prolonged heatwave is affecting parts of the UK, with yellow and amber heat health alerts issued for Midlands and Southern England until July 11-12, and temperatures expected to peak around 34C in the South East by Thursday or Friday.

angles.name: Stay Hydrated
angles.copy: Another week, another heatwave! Temperatures could hit 34C in parts of the UK. Remember to stay hydrated and keep cool out there! ☀️

angles.name: Cooling Tips
angles.copy: With heat health alerts in place, it's crucial to stay safe. What are your top tips for beating the heat this week?

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Series 13, hosted by Maya Jama, is in full swing on ITV2 and ITVX, airing six nights a week after launching on June 1st.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Who's been glued to Love Island this week? The drama in the villa is heating up faster than the UK weather! 🔥 #LoveIslandUK

angles.name: Favourite Islander
angles.copy: Love Island is providing all the summer entertainment! Who's your favourite islander and why? Let us know!

moments.title: New Scottish Thriller 'The Dark'
moments.blurb: The new six-part murder drama 'The Dark', set in the Scottish countryside and starring Laura Donnelly, is set to premiere on ITV and ITVX on July 12.

angles.name: New Scottish Drama
angles.copy: Get ready for some chilling new drama! Scottish thriller 'The Dark' premieres on ITV and ITVX this Friday, July 12th. Who's tuning in?

angles.name: Murder Mystery
angles.copy: A new murder mystery set in the Scottish wilderness is coming to our screens. Will you be able to uncover the killer in 'The Dark'?

moments.title: Welsh Drama 'The Light In The Hall: Still Waters'
moments.blurb: The second series of the Welsh drama 'The Light In The Hall: Still Waters' is currently airing on Channel 4, following a journalist uncovering a dark crime.

angles.name: Welsh Crime Drama
angles.copy: Gripping Welsh drama 'The Light In The Hall: Still Waters' is on Channel 4 now! Who's been following the mystery?

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge-watch? The Welsh-made 'The Light In The Hall: Still Waters' is getting rave reviews on Channel 4!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival returns to Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15-18, featuring a diverse lineup including James and The Human League.

angles.name: Island Festival
angles.copy: Scotland! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off on July 15th in Stornoway. Ready for a fantastic blend of music and culture?

angles.name: Scottish Highlands
angles.copy: Planning a trip to the Scottish Highlands? The Hebridean Celtic Festival brings James and The Human League to Stornoway next week!
